_comment: Gold for ex2. cosine_similarity is graded offline by COSINE_CASES (mirrored here). Live semantic recall depends on the Voyage model and is not a fixed number — grade on the qualitative wins instead.

semantic_win.expect: retrieves people-and-culture (attrition) despite no shared words

semantic_weakness.expect: ranks research-and-development (Halibut) below the lexical winner
